message:
refactor(cli): Improve collections command with env injection and helpers

Updates the collections command to support environment injection and
adds cleaner helper functions:

Environment Injection:
- requireAuth(options, env) - accepts env for credential checks
- requirePremium(options, env) - accepts env for tier validation
- resolvePromptForExport(promptId, options, env) - passes env through

New Helper Functions:
- isPremiumError(response) - checks if 403 response indicates premium
  requirement (status === 403 && error contains "premium")
- Cleaner separation of error classification logic

Code Quality Improvements:
- Better function signature formatting
- Consistent env parameter default (= process.env)
- Improved whitespace and formatting consistency
- Import cleanup: ApiClient instead of apiClient singleton

These changes enable proper unit testing of collection commands by
allowing test fixtures to inject mock environments and credentials.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
